query:
query reportDataQuery($input: GetReportDataInput) {
  getReportData(input: $input) {
    granularity
    hadPrevious
    hasNext
    size
    startDate
    endDate
    page
    columns {
      label
      valueFormat
      isGraphable
      translationKey
      isDefaultSortAscending
      isDefaultGraphed
      isDefaultSelected
      isDefaultSortColumn
      __typename
    }
    rows
    __typename
  }
}
